subcodes.first_line: O My Handmaiden! O My Maidservant! Say: All praise be unto Thee, inasmuch as Thou hast caused me to drink, from the hand of Thy bounty, the choice wine of Thy knowledge, and hast guided me [3.5s]... ...Praise be unto Thee inasmuch as Thou hast given me to drink by the hand of Thy bounty of the wine of Thy knowledge, hast led me unto Thy path
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یا امتی قولی لک الحمد بما سقیتنی من ید عطائک رحیق عرفانک و هدیتنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transcendence; unknowability of God
